colombia_api_rues_v3.description: Query Colombia’s RUES registry by NIT with category-specific basic data via GET /v3/co/rues.

peru_identity_extra_lookup_v3.title: Peru - Full ID
peru_identity_extra_lookup_v3.description: Extended Peruvian citizen identity verification with comprehensive DNI details using Verifik's KYC API. Connect with official sources and verify detailed identity data in seconds.

peru_identity_lookup_v3.title: Peru - Peru
peru_identity_lookup_v3.description: Verify identities of Peruvian citizens using DNI v3 API

colombia_api_identity_ppt_foreigner_id.title: Colombia — PPT (Temporary Protection Permit)
colombia_api_identity_ppt_foreigner_id.description: Verify Permiso de Protección Temporal (PPT) status with Migración Colombia via GET /v2/co/foreigner-id/ppt.

colombia_api_min_trabajo_v3.title: Colombia — Ministry of Labor certificates (v3)
colombia_api_min_trabajo_v3.description: Labor and height-safety (“curso de alturas”) certificate data from Colombia’s Ministry of Labor via GET /v3/co/ministerio-de-trabajo/certificados.

colombia_sisben_api_lookup.title: Colombia — SISBEN score
colombia_sisben_api_lookup.description: Verify SISBEN (Sistema de Identificación de Potenciales Beneficiarios de Programas Sociales) score and group classification for Colombian residents.

face_recognition_detect_face.title: Face Detection
face_recognition_detect_face.description: Detect and validate the presence of a human face in an image. Useful as a pre-step for liveness or face-compare flows; returns face bounding boxes and quality signals.

peru_api_company_lookup_v3.title: Peru - Peruvian Business Verification
peru_api_company_lookup_v3.description: Validate Peruvian companies with Verifik's KYB API. Connect with official sources and verify business data in seconds.

document-liveness.title: Document Liveness Detection
document-liveness.description: Check whether a captured ID image is a real document or a screen/print attack. Returns liveness scores and indicators to harden KYC document-capture flows.

consultar_procesos_judiciales.title: Colombia - Judicial Processes
consultar_procesos_judiciales.description: Check complete judicial history and active legal processes.

credit_intent.title: Credit Purchase Intent
credit_intent.description: Create a Verifik credit purchase intent for x402 settlement. Returns the intent id and pricing metadata used to confirm the on-chain payment for downstream API calls.

Mexico_api_ine_model_e.title: Mexico - INE Model E
Mexico_api_ine_model_e.description: Validate a Mexican INE document, Model E. Provide the OCR/MRZ fields from the credential to verify authenticity against the INE registry.

Mexico_api_ine_model_d.title: Mexico - INE Model D
Mexico_api_ine_model_d.description: Validate a Mexican INE document, Model D. Provide the OCR/MRZ fields from the credential to verify authenticity against the INE registry.

Mexico_api_ine_model_c.title: Mexico - INE Model C
Mexico_api_ine_model_c.description: Validate a Mexican INE document, Model C. Provide the OCR/MRZ fields from the credential to verify authenticity against the INE registry.

api_autodata_enginer.title: Vehicle Engine Database
api_autodata_enginer.description: Vehicle engine reference dataset. Look up engine families and specifications used by other Autodata endpoints.

api_autodata_enginer_code.title: Vehicle Engine Code Lookup
api_autodata_enginer_code.description: Resolve a vehicle engine by its engineer/manufacturer code. Returns engine specs and compatibility data for parts and diagnostics workflows.

data_finance_incomestatement.title: Financial - Income Statement
data_finance_incomestatement.description: Public-company income statement data. Provide a ticker to retrieve revenue, expenses, and earnings line items for financial analysis.

data_finance_balancesheet.title: Financial - Balance Sheet
data_finance_balancesheet.description: Public-company balance sheet data. Provide a ticker to retrieve assets, liabilities, and equity line items used in financial analysis.

data_finance_cashflow.title: Financial - Cash Flow
data_finance_cashflow.description: Public-company cash flow statement data. Provide a ticker to retrieve operating, investing, and financing cash flow line items.

data_finance_stockprice.title: Financial - Stock Price
data_finance_stockprice.description: Stock price quotes for public companies. Provide a ticker to retrieve current and historical price data for analytics and dashboards.

canada_api_driver_license_alberta.title: Canada - Driver License
canada_api_driver_license_alberta.description: Validate a Canadian (Alberta) driver license. Provide the license number and supporting fields; returns issuance, status, and identity metadata for KYC checks.

us_api_passport_entries.title: United States - Passport & U.S. entries
us_api_passport_entries.description: Query passport-related U.S. entry and exit information using traveler and passport fields

api_data_sheet_vehicle_by-plate_br.title: - Vehicle Verification
api_data_sheet_vehicle_by-plate_br.description: Brazilian vehicle data sheet by license plate. Provide the plate to retrieve registration metadata, technical fields, and history for fleet and underwriting workflows.

face_recognition_search_active_user.title: Global - Face Search 1:N (Active User)
face_recognition_search_active_user.description: 1:N search variant without liveness, for active sessions

spain_api_vehicle_lookup.title: Spain - Spain
spain_api_vehicle_lookup.description: Query Spanish vehicle registration data by license plate (matrícula) via Verifik.

colombia_api_inpec.title: Colombia - INPEC Prison Records Check
colombia_api_inpec.description: Query the population deprived of liberty under the custody of INPEC (Colombian National Penitentiary and Prison Institute)

colombia_sigep_by_name.title: Colombia — SIGEP lookup by full name
colombia_sigep_by_name.description: Search Colombian public officials and government contractors by full name in the SIGEP directory.

colombia_sigep_by_number.title: Colombia — SIGEP lookup by document
colombia_sigep_by_number.description: Look up Colombian public officials and government contractors using their ID number (CC or NIT) via SIGEP.

colombia_inpec_lookup.title: Colombia - INPEC Prison Records Check
colombia_inpec_lookup.description: Query the population deprived of liberty under the custody of INPEC (Colombian National Penitentiary and Prison Institute)

zelf-proofs.title: Global - Encrypt HumanID
zelf-proofs.description: Create a HumanID (verifiable credential) by encrypting metadata and storing it in IPFS

zelf-proof-liveness-active-user.title: Zelf Proof with Liveness (Active user)
zelf-proof-liveness-active-user.description: Zelf Proof with Liveness detection service for enhanced identity verification. This service provides proof generation with active liveness detection to ensure the person is physically present during verification.

guatemala_api_identity_extra_lookup.title: Guatemala - Guatemala Extra
guatemala_api_identity_extra_lookup.description: Validate the identity of individuals in Guatemala with additional details such as birth date and gender.

india_api_epic_lookup.title: India - India EPIC (Voter ID) — Person & Name Lookup | Verifik
india_api_epic_lookup.description: Retrieve voter name and related fields from the Electoral Commission of India (ECI) using a 10-character EPIC (Voter ID) via Verifik's API.

india_api_epic_voting_lookup.title: India - India EPIC (Voter ID) — Polling & voting location | Verifik
india_api_epic_voting_lookup.description: Retrieve assembly, part, and polling-place details for an Indian EPIC (Voter ID) from ECI-oriented sources via Verifik''s API.

co_bogota_taxi_plate.title: Colombia - Bogotá Taxi Driver Information by Plate
co_bogota_taxi_plate.description: Retrieve taxi driver and operation card information in Bogotá by vehicle plate.

co_bogota_taxi_driver_card.title: Colombia - Bogotá Taxi Driver by Card
co_bogota_taxi_driver_card.description: Taxi driver verification in Bogotá by driver card/license number. Retrieves driver-related data associated with the provided card.

colombia_api_identity_lookup_premium.title: Colombia — National ID premium lookup (CC)
colombia_api_identity_lookup_premium.description: Verify a Colombian national ID (CC) with a full profile: you type only the number, Verifik finds the issue date for you, and you get the same rich identity record as cédula extra. Uses more credits than the basic cédula check.
